name: SOC Mate
description: Analyst's everyday companion: site-aware IOC extraction (Splunk + Defender DOM, IPv4+IPv6), Defender process tree + command-line capture, sanitize/defang/redact, Splunk OR/AND/IN + Defender KQL builders, *Wildcard* toggle, decoders + HTML/HTTP/UA/subnet utilities, live VT/AbuseIPDB/RDAP/Geo enrichment.

extract-page.description: Extract IOCs from the active page (works even when popup is closed)
